full_text:
Ju Guang 鞠光
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ju Guang (鞠光). Rebelled against Wei in Xiping, but was killed by his own followers. Ju Guang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
